feedItems.description: allocated £100.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£318 per resident)
allocated £71.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£227 per resident)
allocated £53.7m to Environment & Streets (≈£170 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £85 (4.7%) to £1878
